states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_right(), True)
states.description: Move right, within 12m of goal and >4m from defender, call pass

states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_left(), True)
states.description: Move left, within 12m of goal and >4m from defender, call pass

states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_right(), True)
states.description: Move right, within 12m of goal and >4m from defender, call pass

states.name: Pass(teammate)
states.description: Now make the quick return pass

transitions.description: Teammate is right of defender, so I go left
Sides look balanced; default to right flank
Teammate is left of defender, so I go right
Defender presses; wait for 1m lane back to teammate
No pressure; hold and wait for teammate run
